 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75706500</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Germany updates: Deutsche Bank announces record profits]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-29T09:04:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-29T09:04:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/germany-updates-deutsche-bank-announces-record-profits/live-75706500?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Germany's biggest bank has announced record profits just one day after its offices were searched as part of an investigation into money laundering. DW has more.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75706161</id>
  <title><![CDATA[China executes 11 people tied to Myanmar scam compounds]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-29T07:43:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-29T07:43:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/china-executes-11-people-tied-to-myanmar-scam-compounds/a-75706161?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[The 11 members of gangs based in northern Myanmar were sentenced to death in September. Beijing has been cracking down on cyberscam compounds in Southeast Asia in recent years.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75705708</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Colombia: All 15 passengers dead in plane crash]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-29T06:29:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-29T06:29:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/colombia-all-15-passengers-dead-in-plane-crash/a-75705708?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[The aircraft carrying 15 people, including Congressman Diogenes Quintero, made last contact with air traffic control shortly after takeoff.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75703333</id>
  <title><![CDATA[UK's Keir Starmer visits China as Beijing courts US allies]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-29T04:35:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-29T04:35:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/uk-s-keir-starmer-visits-china-as-beijing-courts-us-allies/a-75703333?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Keir Starmer is in China for the first trip by a British prime minister since 2018. He is the latest in a string of European leaders to visit recently, with German Chancellor Friedrich Merz soon to follow.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75705017</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Tesla profit slumps amid lower EV sales, AI spending surge]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-29T00:59:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-29T00:59:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/tesla-profit-slumps-amid-lower-ev-sales-ai-spending-surge/a-75705017?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[With increased competition and heavy attention on the antics of the company's CEO, Tesla's core electric vehicle business has faltered in the past year.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75702908</id>
  <title><![CDATA[German development policy: Partners in the Global South]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-28T21:15:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-28T21:15:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/german-development-policy-partners-in-the-global-south/a-75702908?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[The Federal Minister for Economic Cooperation and Development is focusing on solidarity and partnership in turbulent geopolitical times. Alabali Radovan's trip to Sierra Leone in West Africa illustrates what this means.]]></summary>
  <category term="Germany"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75703608</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Minnesota: Agents in Pretti shooting placed on leave — media]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-28T20:48:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-28T20:48:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/minnesota-agents-in-pretti-shooting-placed-on-leave-media/live-75703608?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Two agents involved in the shooting of Alex Pretti have reportedly been placed on leave. Meanwhile, a suspect who targeted Democratic congresswoman Ilhan Omar has a criminal history and made pro-Trump posts, police say.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75703637</id>
  <title><![CDATA[US Fed keeps rates unchanged despite Trump pressure]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-28T19:59:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-28T19:59:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/us-fed-keeps-rates-unchanged-despite-trump-pressure/a-75703637?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[The Federal Reserve has decided to keep interest rates between 3.5% and 3.75%. Two Fed governors voted against the move, and instead backed a rate cut, while 10 officials were in favor of leaving rates the same.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75702827</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Budapest mayor charged over Pride parade]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-28T18:54:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-28T18:54:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/budapest-mayor-charged-over-pride-parade/a-75702827?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Prosecutors in Hungary are moving against Budapest’s mayor, Gergely Karacsony, after last year's Pride went ahead despite a police ban. The case is being handled without a court hearing and as elections approach.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75699857</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Marco Rubio defends Trump's Venezuela policy in heated hearing]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-28T17:30:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-28T17:30:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/marco-rubio-defends-trump-s-venezuela-policy-in-heated-hearing/a-75699857?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[The top US diplomat testified before the Senate Foreign Relations Committee. In early January, the United States seized Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro in an operation and brought him to New York to face charges.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75702595</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Sicily landslide forces evacuation of 1,500]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-28T17:29:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-28T17:29:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/sicily-landslide-forces-evacuation-of-1-500/a-75702595?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[A landslide in southern Sicily has homes balanced at the edge of a cliff following days of rain. Officials have said some people won't be able to return to living in their homes.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75699359</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Court faults Netherlands over Caribbean island climate risks]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-28T16:12:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-28T16:12:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/court-faults-netherlands-over-caribbean-island-climate-risks/a-75699359?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Judges have ruled that the Dutch government has been failing to adequately protect its citizens on the island of Bonaire from climate threats.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75685467</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Hungary: Cabinet member uses vulgar slur to insult Roma]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-28T16:00:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-28T16:00:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/hungary-cabinet-member-uses-vulgar-slur-to-insult-roma/a-75685467?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Transportation Minister Janos Lazar says Hungary doesn't need foreign workers and crudely joked that Roma should clean dirty toilets in their stead. Will his comments cost Viktor Orban's party in upcoming elections?]]></summary>
  <category term="World"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75699453</id>
  <title><![CDATA[1.2 million Russian soldiers killed, injured in Ukraine — report]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-28T15:53:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-28T15:53:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/1-2-million-russian-soldiers-killed-injured-in-ukraine-report/a-75699453?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[A new report has gathered data on battlefield losses from the war in Ukraine, estimating total losses could reach 2 million by April.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75695021</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Scientific research in the Arctic has been a global collaboration for decades. Some researchers fear Trump's Greenland grab is threatening their work.]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-28T15:46:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-28T15:46:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/scientific-research-in-the-arctic-has-been-a-global-collaboration-for-decades-some-researchers-fear-trump-s-greenland-grab-is-threatening-their-work/a-75695021?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Science in the Arctic — and Greenland — is on the frontline of pressing challenges facing humanity, like climate change and genetics. Some researchers worry international collaboration is at risk.]]></summary>
  <category term="Science"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75696434</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Inside the Philippines' struggle for rural health care]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-28T15:40:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-28T15:40:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/inside-the-philippines-struggle-for-rural-health-care/a-75696434?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[The Philippines' "doctors to the barrios" model shows how workforce shortages, intersected with governance, financing and system design, reveal why rural care remains fragile despite years of reforms.]]></summary>
  <category term="World"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75696407</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Israel holds funeral for last remaining Gaza hostage]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-28T15:32:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-28T15:32:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/israel-holds-funeral-for-last-remaining-gaza-hostage/a-75696407?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Ran Gvili's funeral marks the end of a painful chapter in Israel and could see the start of the second phase of the Gaza ceasefire.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75695779</id>
  <title><![CDATA[CDU, Merz target 'lifestyle part-time' work in Germany]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-28T14:44:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-28T14:44:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/cdu-merz-target-lifestyle-part-time-work-in-germany/a-75695779?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[A proposal from the economic wing of Germany’s CDU to place tighter restrictions on part-time contracts has come under heavy scrutiny. Chancellor Merz has repeatedly criticized the German work ethic in the past year.]]></summary>
  <category term="Germany"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75696199</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Should Europe worry about euro strength and dollar weakness?]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-28T14:42:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-28T14:42:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/should-europe-worry-about-euro-strength-and-dollar-weakness/a-75696199?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[The euro has reached its highest level against the US dollar since 2021. That has consequences for European companies and consumers, but few think the European Central Bank should intervene yet.]]></summary>
  <category term="Business"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75693261</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Amazon cuts more corporate jobs in post-pandemic downsize]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-28T14:13:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-28T14:13:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/amazon-cuts-more-corporate-jobs-in-post-pandemic-downsize/a-75693261?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Amazon told employees that it was cutting 16,000 corporate jobs, completing a downsizing move that began last year. The online retail giant had recruited during a COVID pandemic spike in demand.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75698178</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Trump tells Iran 'time running out' for nuclear deal]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-28T14:08:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-28T14:08:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/trump-tells-iran-time-running-out-for-nuclear-deal/a-75698178?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Iran is back in US President Donald Trump's focus after he appears to have rolled back his threats over Greenland. This time, German Chancellor Merz also said the Iranian government's "days are numbered."]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
</feed>
